sharingOwnerRules.label: Provisioning Orders Visible to Regional Sales - North
sharingOwnerRules.description: Lets North sales reps track fulfillment progress read-only on orders owned by the Provisioning team, without granting edit access.

sharingOwnerRules.label: Provisioning Orders Visible to Regional Sales - South
sharingOwnerRules.description: Lets South sales reps track fulfillment progress read-only on orders owned by the Provisioning team, without granting edit access.
